title: Vanilla Extended Crossplay Light
description: A lightweight modpack that enhances Minecraft’s vanilla feel with better performance and crossplay support.
body:
## 🧱 Vanilla Extended Crossplay - Light

Vanilla Extended – Crossplay Edition Light is the lightweight version of the main Vanilla Extended modpack — designed to bring the same expanded vanilla experience, but with fewer mods, better performance, and maximum compatibility.

### 🌍 Features

- Crossplay Support: Play seamlessly with both Java and Bedrock players.
- Lightweight & Fast: Optimized for smooth gameplay, even on low-end PCs or small servers.
- Vanilla-Friendly Additions: Adds subtle improvements and small features that feel natural to the base game.
- Performance Tweaks: Includes mods that boost FPS, reduce lag, and improve stability.
- Server-Ready: Easy to host and ideal for communities or casual multiplayer.
